Modern edition · preserved source

T. S. Eliot Hypertext Project

BrowseSearchAbout

Recovered scholarship · static edition

Read across text, annotation, image, and source.

The T. S. Eliot Hypertext Project was created by Arwin van Arum in 1998. This modern edition returns its scholarly network to durable, independently addressable documents.

About the project
